name: City Auto Rickshaw Game
description: Welcome to the world of the city tuk tuk rickshaw game. Get ready to drive your favorite auto rickshaw in tuk tuk rickshaw driving game, the ultimate rickshaw driving game featuring thrilling pick and drop missions in a beautifully designed open city environment. Choose from 10 unique tuk tuk rickshaws, each with realistic controls and detailed interiors. From city auto rickshaw rides to thrilling tuk tuk games challenges, this sim brings you endless fun with smooth gameplay and detailed 3D graphics. The environments in our tuk tuk simulator game are visually stunning, providing an immersive experience for gamers.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
